title: Backend Java / Springboot Developer
published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: Join our backend Java team in Montpellier. You design high-performance microservices with Spring Boot and contribute to the architectural modernisation of our clients' systems.
mission.1: Développer des microservices Java Spring Boot
mission.2: Concevoir et documenter des API REST (OpenAPI/Swagger)
mission.4: Mettre en place des pipelines CI/CD (Jenkins, GitLab CI)
mission.5: Écrire des tests unitaires et d'intégration
mission.6: Contribuer aux revues de code et aux décisions d'architecture
profile.2: 3 à 6 years of experience Java Spring Boot
profile.3: Proficiency in Spring Boot, JPA, REST
profile.4: Knowledge of Docker et des pratiques CI/CD
profile.5: Rigueur et culture du code propre
